label: Print / Save PDF
expected_behavior: Calls window.print() to print or save the rendered estimate as a PDF.
reveal_state: after:estimate-loaded (button row injected into #evRoot once the estimate doc renders)
notes: Customer-facing read-only estimate viewer. Entire UI is JS-built into #evRoot; only renders after a valid estimate loads.

label: Back
expected_behavior: Calls history.back() to return to the previous page.
reveal_state: after:estimate-loaded (button row injected into #evRoot once the estimate doc renders)
notes: Customer-facing. Only the print + back buttons are interactive on this page; line items and totals are static text.

route: N/A (standalone public, ?token= query param, no Firebase auth)
label: ✍️ Submit Signature
expected_behavior: postMessages {__nbd_sig:'finalize'} to the sandboxed doc iframe to bake canvas signatures into PNGs, then POSTs submitSignature({token,signedHtml}) to the Cloud Function; on success burns the token and shows the 'All done' confirmation. Alerts if signature missing / iframe still loading.
reveal_state: after:document-loaded (footer #spFoot is display:none until getSignDocument succeeds and the iframe fires load)
notes: Customer/remote-signer facing. Token-gated public page (no auth). DANGER: this is the e-signature commit — drive only to the confirm/finalize boundary, do not submit a real signature against a live token. The doc-to-sign lives inside the sandboxed #spFrame iframe (srcdoc'd HTML loading signature-widget.js).

label: ← Back
expected_behavior: href is rewritten on auth to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId>; returns the rep to the originating customer page.
reveal_state: always (href set after onAuthStateChanged resolves the leadId)
notes: Operator (rep) facing photo review sprint. Auth-gated: redirects to /pro/login.html if not signed in.

label: Generate Report
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/customer.html?id=<leadId>#photo-report, which auto-opens the Homeowner-vs-Adjuster photo-report picker. Disabled while there are zero photos.
reveal_state: always (disabled attr toggled: enabled only when state.photos.length > 0)
notes: Operator facing. Hand-off to customer page report generator.

label: All / Before / During / After / Needs review
expected_behavior: Sets state.filter to the clicked data-filter value, marks the button active, and re-renders the photo grid filtered to that phase (or 'unsorted' = photos with no phase). Counts in each pill update live from the photo subscription.
notes: Filter tab bar; 5 representative buttons share one delegated handler on #prFilterBar.

label: Photo thumbnail (tap to select)
expected_behavior: Tap toggles the photo into/out of state.selected (shows check overlay + opens bulk bar). Long-press (450ms) opens the full-size lightbox instead. Desktop drag on empty area = lasso multi-select.
reveal_state: after:photos-loaded (repeats per photo tile in #prBody grid)
notes: Representative of the per-photo tile image. De-duped: one entry for all tiles. Selection drives the bulk-action bar.

label: Phase / Location / Damage / Severity chip (+ Phase etc when empty)
expected_behavior: Tap: if AI 'suggested', accepts the AI value and writes it to the photo doc (updateDoc) + toast; if 'empty', opens the value picker overlay; if already set, toasts 'long-press to change'. Long-press always opens the picker overlay for that field.
reveal_state: after:photos-loaded (4 chips repeat per photo tile)
notes: Representative of the 4 metadata chips per tile. Writes to Firestore photos/<id>. Picker option dictionaries at FIELD_OPTIONS (phase/damageType/severity).

label: Picker option (e.g. Before/During/After, Hail/Wind/…, Minor/…)
expected_behavior: Writes the chosen value to the target photo's field (single) or batch-updates all selected photos (bulk mode), via updateDoc/writeBatch + serverTimestamp; closes the picker and toasts confirmation.
reveal_state: modal:prPicker (overlay opened by a chip tap/long-press or a bulk-field button)
notes: Options injected dynamically per field. Clicking the dimmed backdrop closes without saving.

label: Clear value
expected_behavior: Calls applyPickerChoice(null) — clears the field on the target/selected photo(s) by writing null + serverTimestamp, then closes the picker.
notes: Inside the field-value picker overlay.

label: Phase / Damage / Severity (bulk)
expected_behavior: Opens the value picker in bulk mode (photoId=null); the chosen value is batch-applied to every photo in state.selected. No-op if nothing selected.
reveal_state: after:selection (bulk bar #prBulkBar opens when >=1 photo selected)
notes: 3 bulk-field buttons in the bulk action bar.

label: 📤 Share
expected_behavior: Batch-sets sharedWithHomeowner=true on all selected photos (writeBatch) so they appear in the homeowner portal view, toasts the count, clears selection, then best-effort calls PortalLinkHelpers.copyForLead(lead) to copy the portal link.
notes: DANGER(send): publishes photos to the homeowner-visible portal + triggers a share-link copy. Drive to confirm boundary only against test data.

label: Delete
expected_behavior: After a confirm() prompt ('Delete N photos? This can't be undone.'), batch-deletes every selected photo doc from Firestore (writeBatch delete), clears selection, toasts the count.
notes: DANGER(delete): permanent. Has native confirm() gate — stop at the confirm dialog.

label: Done
expected_behavior: Calls clearSelection() — empties state.selected, removes the selected styling from all tiles, and closes the bulk action bar.

label: × (close lightbox)
expected_behavior: Calls closeLightbox() — hides the full-size image overlay and clears the img src. Esc key or backdrop click also close it.
reveal_state: modal:prLightbox (opened by long-press on a tile image)

label: NBD PRO (logo)
expected_behavior: Navigates back to /pro/dashboard.html.
notes: Operator-facing personal daily-success tracker. Topbar.

label: 🔍 Search (Ctrl+F) / CLOSE
expected_behavior: Calls toggleSearch() — shows/hides the search bar (#sbar) and focuses the search input.
notes: Two buttons (topbar 🔍 and the CLOSE inside #sbar) share the same toggle-search action.

label: 🎨 Appearance — Themes, Fonts, Custom
expected_behavior: Calls nbdPickerOpen() — opens the theme/font/custom picker modal (#npm), re-renders category chips and theme grid.
notes: Theme picker overlaps the SPA theme engine (maps.js) — same nbdPickerOpen surface.

label: ⚙️ Customize Your Daily OS / Customize Now
expected_behavior: Calls openOnboard() — opens the 4-step onboarding modal (#mOnboard) to configure North Star goal, focus areas, daily floors, and reward.
reveal_state: always (⚙️); the 'Customize Now' twin is in the dismissable onboard banner)
notes: Two triggers share open-onboard.

label: 📖 Welcome Guide & Install
expected_behavior: Calls openWelcomeGuide() → openM('welcomeModal') — opens the welcome/install guide modal (PWA install steps + theme picker).

label: + NEW
expected_behavior: Calls smartNewPage() — creates a new daily page/tab (smart default type), adds it to the tab row and switches to it.

label: RENAME
expected_behavior: Calls openRename() — opens the Rename Tab modal (#mRen) prefilled with the current tab name.

label: DELETE
expected_behavior: Calls triggerDel() — opens the Delete Page confirmation modal (#mDel) for the current page.
notes: DANGER(delete): opens a confirm modal; actual delete is the do-delete button (pages-a-029).

label: CSV
expected_behavior: Calls exportCSV() — exports the page/tracker data as a downloadable CSV file.

label: PDF
expected_behavior: Calls doPrint() — triggers print/PDF export of the current daily page.

label: SAVE
expected_behavior: Calls saveNow() — forces an immediate persist of the current page state (localStorage + Firestore sync via ds-firebase-sync.js).

label: Quick Start with Defaults
expected_behavior: Calls quickStartDefaults() — seeds the tracker with default floors/goals without going through onboarding.

label: × (dismiss onboard banner)
expected_behavior: Calls hideBanner() — dismisses the onboarding banner.

label: Search across all pages… (input)
expected_behavior: On input, calls doSearch(value) — searches across all daily pages and renders matches into the #sdrop dropdown.
notes: Search results are search-jump buttons (data-action=search-jump) injected into #sdrop that switch to the matching page.

label: Cancel / Close
expected_behavior: Calls closeM(arg) — closes the modal identified by data-arg (mDel, mRen, mPRH, or mOnboard).
reveal_state: modal (each of the 4 modals has its own close-m button)
notes: Representative of 4 modal cancel/close buttons sharing close-m.

label: Delete
expected_behavior: Calls doDelete() — permanently deletes the targeted daily page/tab and closes the Delete modal.
notes: DANGER(delete): this is the confirm-boundary action inside the Delete Page modal. Stop here / only against test data.

label: Rename Tab input + Save
expected_behavior: #renInp is a 22-char tab name field; Save (apply-ren) calls applyRen() to persist the new tab name and close #mRen.
notes: Combines the rename text input and its Save button.

label: Primary Goal Category (select)
expected_behavior: Onboarding step 1 dropdown choosing the North Star goal category (Make more money / Build a stronger body / Improve discipline / Grow my business / Other). Value read by onboardNext when advancing.

label: Specific Target / Deadline / Bodyweight (inputs)
expected_behavior: Onboarding step 1 text/number fields capturing the target+deadline goal and bodyweight (sets protein-floor target). Values consumed by onboardNext/save.
notes: 3 settings inputs grouped (one representative entry).

label: Focus Areas checkboxes (Sales/Fitness/Nutrition/Mindset/Learning/Other)
expected_behavior: Onboarding step 2 multi-select checkboxes choosing which areas the daily floors reinforce; selections shape the default floors offered in step 3.
notes: 6 checkboxes (one representative entry).

label: + ADD FLOOR
expected_behavior: Calls addFloorRow() — appends a new editable floor row (label/target/unit inputs + remove ×) to #floor-editor and re-renders. Max 7 floors.

label: Floor label / target / unit inputs + × remove
expected_behavior: Per-row: label input → ob-floor-label, target number → ob-floor-target, unit input → ob-floor-unit (each updates obFloors[idx] live); × button → removeFloorRow(idx) deletes the row and re-renders.
reveal_state: modal:mOnboard (step 3; rows added dynamically by renderFloorEditor)
notes: Representative of dynamic floor rows (repeats per floor, up to 7). Inputs use data-input-action; × uses data-action.

label: Earned Reward (input)
expected_behavior: Onboarding step 4 text field for the reward earned when all floors are cleared.

label: Show reward name on every daily page (toggle)
expected_behavior: Onboarding step 4 toggle controlling whether the reward name is displayed on each daily page; default checked.

label: ← Back (onboarding)
expected_behavior: Calls onboardPrev() — moves the onboarding wizard to the previous step; hidden on step 1.

label: Next → (onboarding)
expected_behavior: Calls onboardNext() — validates/advances the onboarding wizard; on the final step saves the configured goal/floors/reward and closes the modal.

label: Page tab + × (per tab)
expected_behavior: Clicking a tab → switchTo(pageIdx) renders that daily page; the × on a tab → trigger-del-tab(idx) opens the Delete Page confirm for that tab (stopPropagation so it doesn't also switch).
reveal_state: always (tabs rendered into #tabrow, one per page; repeats per tab)
notes: Representative of the dynamic tab row. The × is a delete trigger (opens confirm modal).

label: Daily floor item (tap to toggle met)
expected_behavior: Calls toggleFloor(floorId) — marks the daily floor hit/unhit (dot + label state), updates progress toward the earned reward.
reveal_state: after:page-render (repeats per configured floor on a daily page)
notes: Representative of dynamic floor checklist items.

label: Mindset checklist item (tap to toggle)
expected_behavior: Calls toggleMindset(mindsetId, el) — toggles the mindset/habit checkbox on/done state and marks the page dirty.
notes: Representative of dynamic mindset items.

label: Habit grid cell (tap to mark day)
expected_behavior: Calls toggleHabit(el, habitKey, habitRow) — toggles a habit-day cell on/off, recomputes the row's x/7 score, marks dirty.
reveal_state: after:page-render (habit tracker page; repeats per habit row × 7 days)
notes: Representative of the habit grid cells.

label: Section collapse/expand header
expected_behavior: Calls toggleSection(el) — collapses/expands a content section on a daily page.
notes: Representative of section toggles.

label: + ADD EXERCISE / × delete exercise row
expected_behavior: add-exercise → addExercise({},true) appends a 5-field exercise row (name/sets/reps/weight/notes) + marks dirty; delete-exercise → removes the row's <tr> and marks dirty.
reveal_state: after:page-render (fitness section; delete repeats per exercise row)
notes: Fitness exercise log. Row inputs use data-input-action=mark-dirty.

label: Meal protein/carbs/fat/calories inputs
expected_behavior: On input, calls calcMacros() to recompute daily macro totals (sums each column into dt-*/ms-* readouts) and marks dirty.
reveal_state: after:page-render (diet section; repeats per meal row × 5 columns)
notes: Representative of the diet macro grid inputs.

label: Personal-record lift weight input
expected_behavior: On input, calls prStamp(prKey, value) to record/auto-timestamp the new PR for that lift and marks dirty; the stamp text updates under the field.
reveal_state: after:page-render (PR section; repeats per lift in LIFTS)
notes: Representative. Also has body-metric (bm-*) inputs with data-input-action=mark-dirty.

label: HISTORY (lift PR history)
expected_behavior: Calls openPRHistory(lift, prKey) — opens the Lift History modal (#mPRH) listing past PR values/dates for that lift.
notes: Representative of per-lift HISTORY buttons.

label: Scoreboard / body-metric / generic field inputs
expected_behavior: On input, calls markDirty() to flag unsaved changes (triggers autosave badge + debounced save).
reveal_state: after:page-render (repeats across scoreboard months, body metrics, and other free-text fields)
notes: Catch-all representative for the many mark-dirty fields (12 scoreboard months, 6 body metrics, focus/notes textareas).

label: ✕ (close theme picker)
expected_behavior: Calls nbdPickerClose() — closes the appearance/theme picker modal.

label: Themes / Fonts / Custom Builder (tabs)
expected_behavior: Calls nbdPickerTab(arg, el) — switches the theme picker to the Themes, Fonts, or Custom Builder pane.
notes: 3 tabs.

label: Search themes… (input)
expected_behavior: On input, calls nbdRenderThemes() — re-filters/re-renders the theme grid to match the query.

label: ⚄ Random
expected_behavior: Calls nbdRandom() — applies a randomly selected theme.

label: Theme category chip
expected_behavior: Calls nbdSetCat(cat, el) — sets the active theme category filter and re-renders the theme grid.
notes: Representative of dynamically-rendered category chips. Theme grid swatches themselves also apply themes on click (rendered by nbdRenderThemes).

label: Custom theme color pickers (Background/Surface/Accent/Text/Muted)
expected_behavior: On input, calls nbdLiveCustom() — live-previews the custom theme using the 5 chosen colors.
notes: 5 color inputs (one representative entry).

label: Apply Preview
expected_behavior: Calls nbdApplyCustom() — applies the custom-built theme as the active theme.

label: Save as Custom Theme
expected_behavior: Calls nbdSaveCustom() — persists the custom theme so it appears as a reusable custom theme.

label: 📖 Guide / Copy Firestore Write
expected_behavior: nbd-howto-open → nbdHowtoOpen() opens the how-to modal (#nhm); nbd-copy-fs → nbdCopyFS() copies a Firestore-write snippet to the clipboard.
notes: Two buttons grouped.

label: ✕ (close how-to)
expected_behavior: Calls nbdHowtoClose() — closes the theme how-to/guide modal (#nhm).

label: Let's Get After It →
expected_behavior: Calls closeWelcome() — hides the first-visit welcome modal and sets localStorage nbd-welcome-seen=1 so it won't reappear.
reveal_state: modal:welcomeModal (shown once on first visit by welcome-gate.js, or reopened via 📖)
notes: Welcome modal also contains a #welcomeThemePicker container filled by JS (theme swatches) — those swatches have no dedicated data-action and apply themes via the shared theme engine.

label: Vault logo (nav to overview)
expected_behavior: Calls navTo('overview') (preventDefault on the anchor) — switches to the Overview page and renders it.
notes: ENTIRE PAGE is admin-only (Joe's internal Eternal Vault session tracker). Every element below is role-gated; non-admin users never reach it.

label: ← Back to Dashboard
expected_behavior: Navigates to /pro/dashboard.html.

label: 💾 Save Now
expected_behavior: Calls manualSave() → clears the autosave timer and calls saveToFirestore() to persist vault state immediately.

label: Sidebar nav: Overview / Sessions / Tasks / Debt / Blockers / Directives / Decisions / Search / Admin
expected_behavior: Calls navTo(page) — marks the nav item active, hides other .page panels, shows #page-<page>, and runs the matching render function (renderOverview/Sessions/Tasks/Debt/Blockers/Directives/Decisions/Search/Admin).
notes: Representative of the 9-item sidebar. Each renders a distinct vault data view.

label: 🚀 Start Next Session
expected_behavior: Calls startNextSession() — navigates to the Admin page and smooth-scrolls to the session-starter prompt generator.

label: View All →
expected_behavior: Calls navTo('sessions') — jumps to the Sessions list page.

label: Session card (open detail)
expected_behavior: viewSessionDetail(num) populates #sessionDetail with the session title + content and scrolls it into view; viewSession(num) navigates to Sessions then delegates to detail.
reveal_state: role-gated (rendered per session card by renderSessions/renderOverview)
notes: Representative of dynamic session cards (repeats per session).

label: Search sessions… (Sessions page input)
expected_behavior: Intended: filterSessions(value) filters the rendered session list by query. NOTE: uses inline oninput= which the strict CSP (script-src-attr 'none') blocks — likely non-functional in prod.
notes: POSSIBLE BUG: inline oninput survives despite the CSP-safe data-v-action input delegate added at vault-page.js:2294 (whose comment claims 'the 2 search inputs use data-v-action'). Verify whether these inputs actually fire under CSP.

label: Search sessions, directives, decisions, tasks… (Search page input)
expected_behavior: Intended: executeSearch() searches across sessions/directives/decisions/tasks (min 2 chars) and renders matches into #searchResults. NOTE: inline oninput= is CSP-blocked.
notes: POSSIBLE BUG: same inline-oninput-vs-CSP concern as pages-a-070. Verify firing under the strict CSP.

label: 🔄 Analyze & Update Backlog
expected_behavior: Calls analyzeSessionsWithAI() (async) — scans all sessions via an AI call and auto-updates the work-queue backlog (tasks/debt/blockers/etc.), updating the status + last-refreshed timestamp.
notes: DANGER(send): triggers a billable AI/Cloud-Function call and mutates the backlog. Drive carefully against test data only.

label: Close (session detail)
expected_behavior: Calls closeSessionDetail() — hides the #sessionDetail panel.

label: Generate Prompt
expected_behavior: Calls generateSessionStarter() — builds the next-session starter prompt text and writes it into #sessionStarterOutput.

label: Session starter prompt output (textarea)
expected_behavior: Editable textarea holding the generated session-starter prompt; populated by Generate Prompt, copied by Copy to Clipboard.

label: 📋 Copy to Clipboard
expected_behavior: Calls copySessionStarter() — copies the generated session-starter prompt from #sessionStarterOutput to the clipboard.

label: Session import payload (textarea)
expected_behavior: Paste field accepting a JS payload / JSON / markdown / plain text; consumed by Import to Firestore.

label: Import to Firestore
expected_behavior: Calls importSessionPayload() — parses the pasted payload and writes the session(s) into Firestore.
notes: DANGER(publish): writes parsed data into Firestore. May surface the duplicate-session resolver (handleDuplicateAction). Drive to confirm boundary only.

label: 💾 Save to Firestore Now
expected_behavior: Calls manualSaveToFirestore() (async) — immediately persists the full vault state to Firestore.
notes: DANGER(publish): full write to Firestore.

label: Session # input + 🔍 Test Parse
expected_behavior: parseSessionTest() (async) parses the single session number entered in #testSessionNum and shows the parse result in #testParseResult (test only — does not commit).
notes: Input + button grouped.

label: 🔄 Parse All Sessions
expected_behavior: Calls parseAllSessions() (async) — parses ALL sessions with content (rate-limited 1/sec) and populates Tasks, Debt, Blockers, Directives, Decisions in Firestore. Cannot be undone (data is saved).
notes: DANGER(publish): batch-writes derived data across 5 collections, irreversible. The page itself warns 'Cannot be undone'. Do NOT run against live vault data.

label: Rename / Save as version / Cancel (duplicate-session resolver)
expected_behavior: Calls window.handleDuplicateAction(arg, arg2) — resolves a duplicate session number on import: 'rename' assigns the suggested next number (arg2), 'version' saves as a new version, 'cancel' aborts.
reveal_state: modal:duplicate-resolver (shown by importSessionPayload when a session number collides)
notes: 3 buttons (rename/version/cancel). handleDuplicateAction is assigned to window only while the resolver is open (deleted after use). rename/version write to Firestore (publish); cancel is none.
